updates.title: Damian knows ...
updates.description:
Damian knows what his favorite game is, and Nightwing has no choice. 
 We reached 19k followers, thank you all so much! 🎉

updates.title: Here it is! ...
updates.description:
Higuruma looking beautiful in his bathtub while being adored by Itadori.  
 I think he washes his feet in a particular way 🤭

updates.title: Since the new season...
updates.description:
Since the new season of Devil May Cry was announced, here’s an illustration from last year. 
 Dante offering you his sweaty sock, hope you like it!

updates.title: I hope...
updates.description:
I hope you enjoyed February’s content! 
 🔸 Naoya and Toji Fushiguro 
 🔸 Garfiel and Subaru Natsuki 
 🔸 Shikamaru 
 🔹 Nanami Kento and Haruta (Monthly comic) 
 Stay tuned for everything we’ll be bringing in March! 🙌

updates.title: Nanami's Method is here!
updates.description:
In this story, discover what Nanami Kento is truly willing to do to make Haruta talk. 
 You know what to do if you want to read it 😉

updates.title: I've seen those scenes...
updates.description:
I've seen those scenes of Aizawa training barefoot, so I decided to draw him. 
 I love this character! hope you like it!

updates.title: Do you think Gojo...
updates.description:
Do you think Gojo fantasized a lot about Toji’s feet? ✨ 
 I’d love to write a story about them.

updates.title: Drew Jinu...
updates.description: Drew Jinu from KPop Demon Hunters. What’s your favorite member of the Saja Boys? 🩷

updates.title: Mortal Kombat Legends
updates.description:
I’m still obsessed with Johnny Cage’s design in Mortal Kombat Legends. 
 We previously drew Reptile, maybe Stryker will be next 💪

updates.title: Shikamaru
updates.description:
Shikamaru’s got a little private training session planned for you, but he’s being pretty mysterious about the details 😈 
 I hope you like it!

updates.title: Yugi
updates.description:
Yugi is your Valentine’s date! What are you planning to do all night? 🤭 
 Happy Valentine’s Day to everyone! 💝

updates.title: Poll
updates.description:
Hi everyone! U can now vote on pqtreon for February's next character. Who will be the next one to show their feet? 😁 
 - Krillin (DBZ) 
 - Shikamaru (Naruto) 
 - Kraft (Sousou no Frieren) 
 - Franky (One Piece)
